titleEn: AgriFood Signals: EIF commits $29m to Irish agrifoodtech, Aphea.Bio and Bayer team up, GLP-1 pills
titleZh: AgriFood Signals：EIF向爱尔兰农业食品科技投资2900万美元，Aphea.Bio与拜耳合作，GLP-1药片获批
summaryZh: 本文是AgFunderNews的行业周报，汇总了农业食品科技领域的重要融资、并购、合作及行业动态。核心内容包括：欧洲投资基金向爱尔兰农业食品创新基金承诺2500万欧元；比利时生物农药公司Aphea.Bio与拜耳合作开发生物杀虫剂；英国批准首款GLP-1减肥药片；此外还有多家农业机器人、昆虫蛋白、替代蛋白、精准喷洒等公司的融资与进展。文章信息密度高，覆盖全球多个市场，但对智慧畜牧（IoT/AI/自动化在养殖业的应用）的直接关联度中等，更多偏向种植业和食品科技。
featuredReason: 本文提供了全球农业食品科技的最新动态，尤其关注精准农业、生物农药和替代蛋白等前沿领域，有助于智慧畜牧从业者了解行业资本流向和技术趋势，但直接涉及养殖业自动化、IoT、AI的内容较少，需结合自身业务筛选相关信息。
contentFull: AgriFood Signals: EIF commits $29m to Irish agrifoodtech, Aphea.Bio and Bayer team up, GLP-1 pills June 11, 2026 | Jennifer Marston Agtech FoodTech Aphea.Bio Image credit: Aphea.Bio AgFunderNews rounds up the most important fundings, mergers, acquisitions, closures, and industry buzz in agtech and foodtech. Funding news 🇪🇸 Samsung backs industrial robotics startup Theker in €85m round Sifted 🇫🇷 Innovafeed raises $59m, scales production, cuts R&D headcount as insect ag hits “industrialization phase” AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 Neion Bio Raises oversubscribed $23 million Series A to advance biologics manufacturing platform and expand pipeline Business Insider 🇺🇸 Leaf raises $13m Series B to bring AI to agribusiness Morningstar 🇨🇦 NS/TX Industries raises $10.5 million to scale alternative protein manufacturing platform Pulse 2.0 🇺🇸 SWARM Engineering raises $10m Series A to scale decision intelligence for agrifood and manufacturing iGrow News 🇮🇳 Manam Chocolate raises $9 million funding from Omnivore, Turner Morrison India Times 🇬🇧 Cordon Technologies raises £1M to help farmers cut pesticide use through precision spraying Tech.eu 🇳🇿 Dairy giant Lacto Japan invests in RuBisCO protein maker Leaft Foods Green Queen The team at Pymwymic. Image credit: Pymwymic M&A, IPOs & partnerships 🇳🇱 Agrifoodtech investor Pymwymic swallows Dutch bank’s food fund Impact Loop 🇦🇷 🇺🇾 NotCo’s Argentina & Uruguay Business to Be Acquired by Molinos Río de la Plata Green Queen 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 Ingredion strikes £3.7 billion ($5 billion) deal to acquire UK ingredient giant Tate & Lyle Vegconomist 🇧🇪 🇩🇪 Aphea.Bio and Bayer will co-develop bioinsecticides Revista Cultivar 🇦🇷 🇺🇾 Molinos Río de la Plata to buy NotCo units in Argentina, Uruguay Yahoo Finance Funds, grants & accelerators 🇱🇺 EIF commits €25 million to €100 million Irish agrifood innovation fund Funds for NGOs 🇺🇸 Coefficient Giving opens $10m funding call for alternative protein taste research Vegconomist People moves 🇺🇸 Jason Fullmer joins Plantible as chief operating officer LinkedIn 🇺🇸 Tyson promotes company insider to COO Food Dive 🇩🇪 Juan Martinez joins SenseUP Biosciences as co-CEO and managing director LinkedIn 🇺🇸 Pivot Bio announces additions to senior management Business Wire 🇺🇸 Mars appoints Kemal Cetin as chief digital & information officer for $36bn snacking business PR Newswire Believer Meats North Carolina factory Image credit Believer Meats Other news 🇦🇺 Pioneering ag-tech startup Goterra enters voluntary administration Smart Company 🇫🇷 Nestlé taps precision-fermented donkey milk to make whey protein without dairy allergens Green Queen 🇬🇧 First GLP-1 tablet for weight loss approved in the UK gov.uk 🇺🇸 UPSIDE Foods submits $50m stalking horse bid for Believer Meats’ US cultivated meat facility AgFunderNews Share this article Sign up for our weekly newsletter. translationZh:
AgriFood Signals：EIF向爱尔兰农业食品科技投资2900万美元，Aphea.Bio与拜耳合作，GLP-1药片获批
2026年6月11日 | Jennifer Marston
农业科技 食品科技 Aphea.Bio
图片来源：Aphea.Bio

AgFunderNews汇总了农业科技和食品科技领域最重要的融资、并购、关闭及行业动态。

融资新闻
🇪🇸 三星支持工业机器人初创公司Theker，完成8500万欧元融资 Sifted
🇫🇷 Innovafeed融资5900万美元，扩大生产并削减研发人员，昆虫农业进入“工业化阶段” AgFunderNews
🇺🇸 Neion Bio超额认购完成2300万美元A轮融资，推进生物制剂制造平台并扩大管线 Business Insider
🇺🇸 Leaf完成1300万美元B轮融资，将AI引入农业企业 Morningstar
🇨🇦 NS/TX Industries融资1050万美元，扩大替代蛋白制造平台规模 Pulse 2.0
🇺🇸 SWARM Engineering完成1000万美元A轮融资，扩大农业食品和制造业的决策智能 iGrow News
🇮🇳 Manam Chocolate从Omnivore、Turner Morrison融资900万美元 India Times
🇬🇧 Cordon Technologies融资100万英镑，通过精准喷洒帮助农民减少农药使用 Tech.eu
🇳🇿 乳业巨头Lacto Japan投资RuBisCO蛋白制造商Leaft Foods Green Queen

Pymwymic团队。图片来源：Pymwymic

并购、IPO及合作
🇳🇱 农业食品科技投资者Pymwymic收购荷兰银行食品基金 Impact Loop
🇦🇷 🇺🇾 NotCo在阿根廷和乌拉圭的业务将被Molinos Río de la Plata收购 Green Queen
🇺🇸 🇬🇧 Ingredion以37亿英镑（50亿美元）收购英国配料巨头Tate & Lyle Vegconomist
🇧🇪 🇩🇪 Aphea.Bio与拜耳将共同开发生物杀虫剂 Revista Cultivar
🇦🇷 🇺🇾 Molinos Río de la Plata将收购NotCo在阿根廷和乌拉圭的业务 Yahoo Finance

基金、资助及加速器
🇱🇺 欧洲投资基金向爱尔兰农业食品创新基金承诺2500万欧元（总额1亿欧元） Funds for NGOs
🇺🇸 Coefficient Giving开放1000万美元资助申请，用于替代蛋白口味研究 Vegconomist

人事变动
🇺🇸 Jason Fullmer加入Plantible担任首席运营官 LinkedIn
🇺🇸 泰森食品提拔内部人士担任首席运营官 Food Dive
🇩🇪 Juan Martinez加入SenseUP Biosciences担任联合CEO兼董事总经理 LinkedIn
🇺🇸 Pivot Bio宣布高级管理层新增人员 Business Wire
🇺🇸 玛氏任命Kemal Cetin为首席数字和信息官，负责360亿美元零食业务 PR Newswire

Believer Meats北卡罗来纳工厂 图片来源：Believer Meats

其他新闻
🇦🇺 先驱农业科技初创公司Goterra进入自愿管理程序 Smart Company
🇫🇷 雀巢利用精密发酵驴奶生产无乳过敏原的乳清蛋白 Green Queen
🇬🇧 英国批准首款GLP-1减肥药片 gov.uk
🇺🇸 UPSIDE Foods对Believer Meats的美国培养肉工厂提交5000万美元的“跟踪马”竞标 AgFunderNews

author: Jennifer Marston
